metodos.codigoOriginal:
Lparameters poformParent, pcAssunto

thisform.oParentForm = poformParent
Set datasession to thisform.oParentForm.DatasessionId

ThisForm.Diretorio = goSistema.DirFiscais

ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', ThisForm.Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
				
		Thisform.LockScreen = .T. 
		Thisform.Height = This.Height - This.CtnSaida_Email.Height
		Thisform.CtnSaid... [TRUNCADO]

lcTpArq = Iif(thisform.optArquivo.Value = 1,[PDF],[XLS])

lcArqSaida = GetFile( lcTpArq , [Arquivo:],[Selecionar],0,[Selecione o arquivo])

If isEmpty( lcArqSaida )
	Return
EndIf

If JUSTEXT(lcArqSaida) $ lcTpArq
	** Ok, Selecionou uma extensăo válida
Else
	lcArqSaida = ForceExt(lcArqSaida, Left( lcTpArq , 3 ))
EndIf

ThisForm.TxtNomeArqSaida.Value = Alltrim( lcArqSaida )

ThisForm.LockScreen = .T. 
If This.Value = 1
	ThisForm.Cmd_GerarPDF.Caption = "Enviar Email"
	ThisForm.Height = ThisForm.Height + ThisForm.CtnSaida_Email.Height 
	ThisForm.CtnSaida_Email.Visible = .T.
Else
	ThisForm.Cmd_GerarPDF.Caption = [\<Gravar] &&ThisForm.Cmd_OK.Tag
	ThisForm.Height = ThisForm.Height - ThisForm.CtnSaida_Email.Height 
	ThisForm.CtnSaida_Email.Visible = .F.
EndIf
ThisForm.Refresh()
ThisForm.LockScreen = .F.

ThisForm.oParentForm.pcArqEmail = Alltrim( Nvl( This.Parent.TxtNomeArqSaida.Value, "" ) )

If Empty( ThisForm.oParentForm.pcArqEmail)
	MessageBox([Selecione um nome para o arquivo!], 48, [Atençăo])
	This.Parent.CmdGetFile.SetFocus()
	Return
EndIf

*!*	ThisForm.oParentForm.lPrintPDFCreator = .T.
*!*	ThisForm.oParentForm.PrintOnExit 	  = .F.

If ThisForm.Chk_EMAIL.Value = 1
	** Anexar o Arquivo no Email. Enviar o Email

	If Used( "TmpEmpMail" ) And RecCount( "TmpEmpMail" ) > 0

		Local lcTO As Str... [TRUNCADO]

If this.Value = 1
	thisform.txtNomeArqSaida.Value = ThisForm.Diretorio + [FORTYUSPDF.PDF]
Else
	thisform.txtNomeArqSaida.Value = ThisForm.Diretorio + [FORTYUSEXCEL.XLS]
Endif

lcDir = ThisForm.Diretorio
If Not Empty(lcDir)
	If Not Directory(lcDir)
		=MessageBox([Diretório năo Localizado],0+64,[Atençăo])
	Else
		loApp = CreateObject([Shell.Application])
		loApp.Open(lcDir)
	EndIf 
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
